description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a low, rectangular seat and gently curved backrest that wraps around the sides. The upholstery is a solid, muted olive or mustard color, giving it a contemporary yet inviting appearance. The backrest is moderately high and smoothly contoured, providing ergonomic support without any visible segmentation or decorative elements. Both sides of the chaise are flanked by short, rounded armrests that seamlessly integrate with the backrest. The seat cushion is thick and plush, appearing to be a single, continuous piece attached to the frame. The chaise stands on four slender, black metal legs that are slightly angled outward, lending a sense of lightness and stability to the overall form.
description: A modern, solid-colored chaise with a curved backrest, integrated armrests, and slender black metal legs. The seat is thick and plush, with a minimalist, contemporary aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, plush seat, curved backrest, and both integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the short, rounded armrest and the outward-angled black metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous curve of the backrest and the symmetry of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and leg design from the opposite angle.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is moderately high, smoothly curved, and wraps around the sides, forming a continuous, unsegmented surface with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, short and rounded, seamlessly integrated with the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, straight, and slightly angled outward, made of black metal with a simple, modern finish and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid-colored with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick, attached seat cushion that spans the width of the chaise, with no additional loose or layered cushions visible.
